prompt: Using the first reference image as the base, replace ONLY the golden coin that is floating/tossed above the character's right hand (viewer's right side) with the exact coin design shown in the second reference image (a circular SILVER-rimmed coin with a deep purple inner face, a stylized white letter 'B' in the center and cyclic white exchange arrows curving around it).
